channel.title: Featured on iSDA
channel.description: Recent content in Featured on iSDA

item.title: One Million Plots. Just Getting Started.
item.description: For most of his farming life, an elderly Ugandan farmer did what the farmers around him did: he applied fertiliser when he could afford it, guessed at the amounts, and watched his neighbours' harvests to figure out whether he was doing things right. Some seasons were better than others, but he didn't know why.

item.title: Virtual Agronomist Reaches 250,000 Farmers: Scaling Real Solutions, Fast
item.description:
Just one month ago, we announced that Virtual Agronomist had reached more than 250,000 farm plots with locally tailored, AI-powered advice. Today, that figure already looks out of date.

We’ve now passed 350,000 farm plots, and for the first time, we can say we are directly serving a quarter of a million farmers themselves.

This is more than a milestone. It’s evidence of huge, rapid growth — and of the power of a model that is working at scale, and in reality, for African farmers.
